item.description:
# DisplayHelperPro 1.1.1
## Product Naming
- Renamed the direct-download build to `DisplayHelperPro`. - Kept the direct-download bundle identifier as `com.xintechll.DisplayHelper` so existing local preferences and Sparkle identity remain continuous. - Kept the App Store build branded as `DisplayHelper`.
## Software Updates
- Added a "Check for Updates..." menu item to the Pro build. - Configured the Pro Sparkle feed at `https://samx2015.github.io/DisplayHelperPro/appcast.xml`. - Prepared Sparkle update signing with the public EdDSA key.
## Privacy & Feedback
- Added feedback menu items for bug reports, feature requests, and general feedback. - Bug report drafts include a bounded DisplayHelperPro diagnostic log excerpt that the user can review and delete before sending. - Display-management features remain local and account-free.
## Install
1. Open the DMG. 2. Drag `DisplayHelperPro.app` onto `Applications - Drag App Here`. 3. Open DisplayHelperPro from Applications.
The app appears in the macOS menu bar.
## Compatibility
Compatibility note: This app depends on macOS display brightness behavior that may change in future macOS updates.
Requires macOS 13.0 or later.
